ocr_findings.description: Image shows vertical text '第3章 経営戦略マネジメント' on the right margin (chapter tab). This chapter label is absent from the OCR output. Not critical for content comprehension but represents missing structural text.
Diagram caption '● コトラーの競争戦略における4つの分類' is captured as plain text after image placeholder, which is correct.
Section header reads '試験にはつしが出る！' in OCR but image shows '試験にはコレが出る！' — 'コレ' rendered as 'つし'. This is a wrong_char OCR error on the stylized font.

reviewer_notes: Page continues 03-03 with チャレンジャー/フォロワー/ニッチャー sections; all body text accurately captured. Two minor issues: vertical chapter margin text missing, and the stylized 'コレ' in the tip box header was misread as 'つし' — a cosmetic wrong_char error that does not affect the bullet-point content below it.
